headline: Australia Construction Equipment Industry Research Report 2025-2030 Featuring Market Leaders - Caterpillar, Komatsu, Volvo CE, Hitachi Construction Machinery, Liebherr and XCMG
summary: The Australia Construction Equipment Market is forecasted to grow from 24,422 units in 2024 to 27,180 units by 2030, at a CAGR of 1.80%. Dominating the market, the earthmoving equipment segment sees high demand, particularly for excavators, fueled by infrastructure development and mining activities. headline: Netherlands Construction Equipment Industry Research Report 2026-2031 Featuring Market Front-Runners - Caterpillar, Komatsu, Hitachi Construction Machinery, Volvo CE, and Liebherr
summary: The Netherlands Construction Equipment Market is projected to grow from 10,356 units in 2025 to 12,332 units by 2031, at a CAGR of 2.95%. The market growth is driven by significant demand for earthmoving equipment, attributed to governmental initiatives to address housing shortages, power grid expansions, and renewable energy infrastructure.
